project_type: Spring Boot 3.2.5 backend + React (Vite) frontend SPA
build_system: Maven (backend), Vite/npm (frontend). Backend uses annotation processing for Lombok + MapStruct with lombok-mapstruct-binding.
test_framework: Spring Boot Test with JUnit 5 (backend), no explicit frontend test setup observed
verification_instructions: 1. Run mvnw compile in backend to verify Java compilation including MapStruct annotation processing. 2. Check frontend for no syntax errors by running a build.
snapshot_or_generated_files: MapStruct generates *Impl.java files under target/generated-sources during compilation. Not checked in.
setup_instructions: Backend: cd backend && ./mvnw compile. Frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build.
environment_constraints: H2 in-memory DB available for dev. MySQL driver also present. No Docker daemon usage required for validation.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: @Data @NoArgsConstructor @AllArgsConstructor @Builder for entities; MapStruct mappers with builder = @org.mapstruct.Builder(disableBuilder = true); Service layer loads related entities before passing to mapper; Controllers return ResponseEntity<ApiResponse<T>>.
key_patterns: Entity: @PrePersist/@PreUpdate for timestamps, @ManyToOne(fetch = LAZY). DTO: uses String for dates, references IDs of related entities plus denormalized names. Mapper: uses CommonConverters.class for date conversions, builder disabled. Service: constructor injection, loads related entities explicitly, throws ResourceNotFoundException/BadRequestException. Controller: @PreAuthorize for write ops, @PageableDefault for lists. Frontend: service files with unwrap() helper for ApiResponse envelope, normalisePage() for Spring Page objects.
